refactor-from-tlpp\ndescription: Analyze an existing ADVPL/TLPP source (.prw/.tlpp) and produce an assertive PO-UI generation prompt — no open-ended brainstorming, one confirmation before code generation"}],"\n",["$","$L1b",null,{"as":"h1","id":"refactor-tlpp--po-ui","children":"Refactor TLPP → PO-UI"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Use when the user provides an existing ",["$","code",null,{"children":".prw"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":".tlpp"}]," file and wants an Angular/PO-UI equivalent."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Goal:"}]," read the source once, extract everything, confirm once, generate."]}],"\n",["$","hr",null,{}],"\n",["$","$L1b",null,{"as":"h2","id":"step-1--read-the-source","children":"Step 1 — Read the source"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Read every file provided (",["$","code",null,{"children":".prw"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":".tlpp"}],", or both). Do not ask questions yet."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Extract the following into a structured analysis (internal only — never dump raw extraction at the user):"}],"\n",["$","$L1b",null,{"as":"h3","id":"11-domain","children":"1.1 Domain"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Routine name (e.g. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MYRTN001"}],")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Main table(s) accessed (e.g. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"ZXX"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"ZXY"}],")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Business description (1 sentence from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"/*/\\{Protheus.doc\\}"}]," or inferred)"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L1b",null,{"as":"h3","id":"12-browse-columns","children":"1.2 Browse columns"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Look for: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"aCampos"}]," array, ",["$","code",null,{"children":"FWFormStruct"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"BeginSQL … SELECT"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"FWBrwColumn"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"GetSX3Cache"}]," calls."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["For each column record: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\\{ field, type, label, align, width \\}"}],".\nComputed/temp fields (prefix ",["$","code",null,{"children":"TT_"}],") are columns too — note them."]}],"\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27","\n","$L28","\n","$L29","\n","$L2a","\n","$L2b","\n","$L2c","\n","$L2d","\n","$L2e","\n","$L2f","\n","$L30","\n","$L31","\n","$L32","\n","$L33","\n","$L34","\n","$L35","\n","$L36","\n","$L37","\n","$L38","\n","$L39","\n","$L3a","\n","$L3b","\n","$L3c","\n","$L3d","\n","$L3e","\n","$L3f","\n","$L40","\n","$L41","\n","$L42"]}]]}]

2c:["$","p",null,{"children":"Map the source to exactly one primary pattern:"}]
2d:["$","div",null,{"className":"relative overflow-auto prose-no-margin my-6","children":["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Source characteristic"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"PO-UI pattern"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Browse + mark/unmark + status legend"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"page-list"}]," + checkboxes + drawer"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Simple browse + inline add/edit (≤10 fields)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"modal-crud"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Complex form navigated via route"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"page-edit"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Aggregation only, no row editing"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"dashboard"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Browse + advanced filter (SX1 perguntas)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"page-dynamic-search"}]}]]}]]}]]}]}]
2e:["$","p",null,{"children":"If summary panels exist → add summary cards strip below the table (not a separate page).\nIf mark/unmark exists → drawer for details + observation, not inline."}]

33:["$","p",null,{"children":"Wait for a single yes/no. Do not ask follow-up questions unless a critical piece is ambiguous (e.g. the module folder name)."}]
34:["$","hr",null,{}]

37:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key substitution additions"}]," beyond the standard placeholders:"]}]
38:["$","div",null,{"className":"relative overflow-auto prose-no-margin my-6","children":["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Placeholder"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Source"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\\{\\{columns\\}\\}"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Extracted column array → ",["$","code",null,{"children":"po-table-column[]"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\\{\\{actions\\}\\}"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Extracted actions → ",["$","code",null,{"children":"po-page-action[]"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\\{\\{statusOptions\\}\\}"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Status map → chip filter + legend"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\\{\\{summaryCards\\}\\}"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Totals panels → summary strip component"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\\{\\{drawerFields\\}\\}"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Browse fields → drawer detail block"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\\{\\{businessRules\\}\\}"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Rules → comments + validation code"}]]}]]}]]}]}]
39:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"No mock data files."}]," Never create ",["$","code",null,{"children":"*.mock.ts"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"*.data.ts"}],", or separate mock files.\nIf the app needs demo data for local development (no backend), add a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"const DEMO_*: Model[] = [...]"}]," at the top of the component file and load it only in the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"error"}]," handler of ",["$","code",null,{"children":"carregar()"}],". This keeps the component self-contained and production-clean."]}]
3a:["$","hr",null,{}]
3b:["$","$L1b",null,{"as":"h2","id":"step-5--verify-angularjson","children":"Step 5 — Verify angular.json"}]
3c:["$","p",null,{"children":["After generating all component files, read ",["$","code",null,{"children":"angular.json"}]," (search upward from the component directory to the workspace root)."]}]
3d:["$","p",null,{"children":["Check that ",["$","code",null,{"children":"architect.build.options.styles"}]," contains the 3 PO-UI theme files:"]}]
3e:["$","$L43",null,{"className":"shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark","style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292e","--shiki-dark":"#e1e4e8","--shiki-light-bg":"#fff","--shiki-dark-bg":"#24292e"},"tabIndex":"0","icon":"<svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"><path d=\"M 6,1 C 4.354992,1 3,2.354992 3,4 v 16 c 0,1.645008 1.354992,3 3,3 h 12 c 1.645008,0 3,-1.354992 3,-3 V 8 7 A 1.0001,1.0001 0 0 0 20.707031,6.2929687 l -5,-5 A 1.0001,1.0001 0 0 0 15,1 h -1 z m 0,2 h 7 v 3 c 0,1.645008 1.354992,3 3,3 h 3 v 11 c 0,0.564129 -0.435871,1 -1,1 H 6 C 5.4358712,21 5,20.564129 5,20 V 4 C 5,3.4358712 5.4358712,3 6,3 Z M 15,3.4140625 18.585937,7 H 16 C 15.435871,7 15,6.5641288 15,6 Z\" fill=\"currentColor\" /></svg>","children":["$","$L44",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#032F62","--shiki-dark":"#9ECBFF"},"children":"\"node_modules/@totvs/po-theme/css/po-theme-default-variables.min.css\""}]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#032F62","--shiki-dark":"#9ECBFF"},"children":"\"node_modules/@totvs/po-theme/css/po-theme-default.min.css\""}]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#032F62","--shiki-dark":"#9ECBFF"},"children":"\"node_modules/@po-ui/style/css/po-theme-core.min.css\""}]}]]}]}]}]
3f:["$","p",null,{"children":["If any are missing, add them ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"before"}]," ",["$","code",null,{"children":"src/styles.scss"}],". Report the fix to the user.\nWithout these 3 files, all PO-UI components render with no styling (no colors, no layout, no typography)."]}]
40:["$","hr",null,{}]
41:["$","$L1b",null,{"as":"h2","id":"token-discipline","children":"Token discipline"}]
42:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Never show the raw extraction to the user — only the formatted plan."}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Never run visual companion (browser/screenshots) during this flow. Reserve for post-generation validation only if the user asks."}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["One ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Read"}]," per file — do not re-read files already in context."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["If two files are provided (",["$","code",null,{"children":".prw"}]," + ",["$","code",null,{"children":".tlpp"}],"), read both in parallel."]}],"\n"]}]
14:[["$","meta","0",{"charSet":"utf-8"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"viewport","content":"width=device-width, initial-scale=1"}]]

16:[["$","title","0",{"children":"Refactor TLPP → PO-UI | poui-specialist"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"description","content":"Use when the user provides an existing .prw or .tlpp file and wants an Angular/PO-UI equivalent."}],["$","meta","2",{"property":"og:title","content":"poui-specialist"}],["$","meta","3",{"property":"og:description","content":"Plugin para Claude Code especializado em PO-UI Angular para TOTVS Protheus. 2 agentes, 3 comandos, 16 templates."}],["$","meta","4",{"property":"og:url","content":"https://alscosta1973.github.io/poui-specialist-docs"}],["$","meta","5",{"property":"og:site_name","content":"poui-specialist"}],["$","meta","6",{"property":"og:locale","content":"pt_BR"}],["$","meta","7",{"property":"og:type","content":"website"}],["$","meta","8",{"name":"twitter:card","content":"summary"}],["$","meta","9",{"name":"twitter:title","content":"poui-specialist"}],["$","meta","10",{"name":"twitter:description","content":"Plugin para Claude Code especializado em PO-UI Angular para TOTVS Protheus. 2 agentes, 3 comandos, 16 templates."}]]
